description.zh-cn: Visual Studio Code 是一个免费的、轻量级且可扩展的代码编辑器，用于构建网页、桌面和移动应用，可以使用任何编程语言和框架。Visual Studio Code 内置了对 Git 源代码管理的支持，并且与 GitHub 有强大的集成，还提供集成调试器，以及带有 IntelliSense 和 AI 驱动的 IntelliCode 的智能代码补全。在 Visual Studio Code Marketplace 中有超过 30,000 个扩展和主题，你可以根据自己的需求、喜好和风格来自定义 Visual Studio Code 的功能和外观。你可以使用 Visual Studio Code 构建任何类型的应用，无论是网页、桌面还是移动设备应用。Visual Studio Code 原生支持 JavaScript 和 TypeScript，还提供了用于 Python、Java、C/C++、C#、Go、Rust、PHP 及更多语言的扩展。
description.en-us: Visual Studio Code is a free, lightweight, and extensible code editor for building web, desktop, and mobile applications, using any programming language and framework.Visual Studio Code has built-in support for Git source control management and powerful integrations with GitHub, an integrated debugger, and smart code completion with IntelliSense and with AI-driven IntelliCode. With over 30,000 extensions and themes in the Visual Studio Code Marketplace, you can customize the features and the look of Visual Studio Code to fit your needs, preferences, and style.You can use Visual Studio Code to build any kind of app, for web, desktop, and mobile. Visual Studio Code supports JavaScript and TypeScript natively and offers extensions for coding in languages such as Python, Java, C/C++, C#, Go, Rust, PHP, and many more.
